title: branding/rebrand-opencms-userfacing — C4 model
description: Presentation-layer rebrand surfaces. No new components; only string substitution at existing surfaces.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime (rebranded to OpenCMS at surfaces)

containers.name: TUI / CLI surface
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/* — Solid-based terminal UI; install scripts.

containers.name: i18n bundles
containers.description: packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts — 16 locale modules consumed by app/desktop UIs.

containers.name: Server + SDK
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/server/routes/* OpenAPI descriptions + packages/sdk/* regen output.

containers.name: Templates and prompts
containers.description: templates/system/*, CONFIG-README, skill SKILL.md, prompt corpus.

components.name: TUI brand strings
components.description: User-visible app name in banners, dialog-status, tips, permission UI.

components.name: Brand i18n keys
components.description: Localized brand mentions per locale module; 'OpenCode Zen' preserved.

components.name: Route OpenAPI descriptions
components.description: Route metadata strings consumed by SDK regen.

components.name: Template + prompt text
components.description: Brand mentions inside system templates, CONFIG-README, skill instructions, prompts.
